title: Getting Started Guide
excerpt: Step-by-step tutorial guiding new users through presets, field customization, live previews, and batch file renaming in FileNamer.

title: App Features
excerpt: Learn how to use FileNamer to design custom file naming templates, fill parameters dynamically, and batch-rename local files entirely in your browser.

title: Project Files Guide
excerpt: Standardize your design, coding, development, and content project directory structures. Organize raw resources and exports logically.

title: Academic Papers Guide
excerpt: Organize research articles, essays, and PDF journals. Maintain author names, publication years, and topic tags systematically.

title: Invoices & Receipts Guide
excerpt: Structure business invoices, payment receipts, expense forms, and bill statements for seamless accounting audits.

title: UTM Campaign Builder Guide
excerpt: Configure UTM query parameters in URL files. Track marketing campaign sources, mediums, terms, and content tags.

title: Media Library Guide
excerpt: Standardize movie and TV show folders for Plex, Radarr, and Sonarr media scrapers using quality, resolutions, and IMDb tags.

title: Template Management Guide
excerpt: Learn how to save your custom structures locally, import or export JSON templates, and share links to your presets.

title: Offline & PWA Support
excerpt: Learn how to install FileNamer as a Progressive Web App (PWA) on macOS, iOS, Android, and Windows for fully offline file renaming.
